description_long: This object depicts a bird with a broad, diamond-shaped body and a slightly pointed tail. The plumage is primarily a pale beige or tan color, with darker, olive-greenish shading along the wings and tail. The head is smoothly integrated into the body, and the beak is short and subtly curved, blending into the facial area. The wings are held close to the body, giving the bird a streamlined, almost flattened appearance. There are no visible legs or feet, and the surface texture appears matte with a slight roughness, resembling natural feathers. The overall form suggests a bird adapted for gliding or soaring, with a simple, naturalistic color palette.
description: A broad, diamond-shaped bird with pale beige and olive-green plumage, short curved beak, and a streamlined, slightly pointed tail. The surface is matte and subtly textured, resembling natural feathers.
description_view_0: The bird is seen from the side, showing its broad body, subtle beak, and the gentle gradient from beige to olive-green on the wing and tail.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the bird's streamlined profile, with the tail and wing blending together and the beak barely visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view displays the full width of the body and the smooth transition of colors, with the tail and beak both visible.
description_view_3: A top-down or edge-on view, emphasizing the narrowness of the body and the pointed tail, with the color gradient running along the length.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid with subtle gradient from beige to olive-green, darker shading on wings and tail
